gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor smiles warmly, gestures with open hands, and steps slightly forward while introducing decimal numbers
a person nods and tilts the head slightly while spreading arms to the side as they explain non-whole numbers
a tutor walks to the side, raises one hand, and sweeps it across as if illustrating a number line for comparison
a person points directly ahead with the right hand and shifts their weight slightly, emphasizing 0.5 over 0.3
a tutor steps back and claps hands together cheerfully while inviting everyone to practice adding decimals
a person holds both hands out with fingers spread, as if counting, while posing a question about the sum of numbers
a tutor raises both arms high and rotates in place, celebrating the learners' achievements in understanding decimals
a person gently waves a hand in a circular motion while nodding, reinforcing the idea of decimals as parts of a whole
